system_formula: multi-agent + economic pressure + memory + behavioral evolution

architecture_layers.name: World Layer
architecture_layers.responsibility: matches, odds, market pressure and external events

architecture_layers.name: Agent Layer
architecture_layers.responsibility: model memory, risk profile, credit state and behavior history

architecture_layers.name: Behavior Kernel
architecture_layers.responsibility: event store, pattern compiler, behavior graph, memory injector and drift detector

architecture_layers.name: Economic System
architecture_layers.responsibility: credit, loan, survival pressure, bankruptcy constraints and ranking

architecture_layers.name: Audit System
architecture_layers.responsibility: decision trace, causality graph, replay validator and pattern influence checker

architecture_layers.name: Civilization Map UI
architecture_layers.responsibility: pressure field, behavior graph, agent identity, replay and hidden data center

freeze_assertions.memory_influences_decision: memory → decision is enforced by prompt memory audit
freeze_assertions.pattern_influences_behavior: pattern → behavior is enforced by pattern participation and sensitivity audit
freeze_assertions.audit_validates_causality: audit → causality is enforced by causal trace and graph checks
freeze_assertions.replay_ensures_determinism: replay → deterministic reconstruction is enforced by replay audit
freeze_assertions.ui_visualizes_civilization_structure: UI → civilization map is the primary public surface

public_surface_policy.home_rule: show behavior structure and behavior change only
public_surface_policy.data_center_rule: show product health and drill-down surfaces only
